headline: Taking A Fresh Look At American Express (AXP) Valuation After Dividend Hike And New Sports Partnerships
summary: American Express (AXP) is back in focus after two fresh developments: a 16% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.95 per share, and new long term sports venue partnerships in New York, New Jersey, and Atlanta. See our latest analysis for American Express. Those headline moves come after a softer share price patch, with a 7 day share price return of 8.38% and a 30 day share price return of 12.13% pulling the stock back from recent highs. Even so, the 1 year total shareholder return of...
